findings.name: feature_columns_present
findings.meaning: The training feature contract must resolve to columns in temporal_ml_rows.csv.

findings.name: no_future_or_label_named_features
findings.meaning: Feature names should not include final outcomes, labels, or assessment-only variables.

findings.name: excluded_columns_not_used_as_features
findings.meaning: Outcome and bookkeeping columns may exist in the dataset but must not be used by the model.

findings.name: one_row_per_patient_cycle
findings.meaning: Duplicate patient-cycle rows can leak repeated labels or overweight specific visits.

findings.name: cycle_order_monotonic_by_patient
findings.meaning: Temporal rows should be ordered by observed treatment cycle.

findings.name: treatment_dates_follow_cycle_order
findings.meaning: Later cycles should not have earlier treatment dates.

findings.name: response_regression_label_is_mri_transform
findings.meaning: The continuous response label is a transparent transform of the observed MRI percent-change signal.

interpretation: This audit verifies that model features are current-cycle or historical monitoring fields. Final outcome labels are present for supervised learning but excluded from model inputs.
claim_boundary: A passed audit reduces obvious synthetic timeline leakage risk; it is not proof against every clinical data leakage mode.
